##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Mg_2.00_(P_1.00_O_4_)(F_0.80_(OH)_0.20_) ; = gray phase, and the light phase is isokite: Ca_1.00_Mg_1.00_(P_1.00_O_4_)(F_0.80_(OH)_0.20_)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
